_comment: qa_spyware.json — nnqr-43 visual QA: render-layer power consumers. P1 piece at (4,5) holds spyware_row. An enemy P2 piece at (4,7) has powers=['jump_proof','shield'] and the powers_revealed meta flag pre-set (simulates post-activation state so the renderer shows the spy badge + power label). A revealed orb at (4,3) has power_id='raise_tile' and revealed=true. No inputs — this is a static visual state; lead validates the PNG. Expected visuals: (1) P2 piece at (4,7) has a purple tint ring + 'jump_proof +1' label below it. (2) Orb at (4,3) shows a small 'raise_tile' label beneath the gold circle.
